summary: Completed testing of all 9 requested features. All features are working correctly: Member dashboard loads directly (no intermediate welcome page), Add Pet CTA shows for users without pets, Pricing Hub has 'Seed from Product Box' button, Adopt Manager has 'Seed Sample Data' button, Product Box CSV export includes image_url column, and image URL field works in product editor.

1_member_dashboard_with_pets.details: Dashboard loads correctly for dipali@clubconcierge.in showing pet Mojo with 100% Soul, 4 pets total, birthday Jan 29

2_member_dashboard_add_pet_cta.details: Users without pets see prominent 'Add Your First Pet' CTA with 'Add Pet Now' button and 'Start your Pet Soul journey' message

3_pricing_hub_seed_button.details: 'Seed from Product Box' button exists and is visible in Pricing Hub. API endpoint /api/product-box/migrate-from-products works correctly

4_adopt_manager_seed_button.details: 'Seed Sample Data' button exists and is visible in Adopt Manager. API endpoint /api/adopt/admin/seed works correctly (seeded 8 pets, 4 shelters, 4 events)

5_product_box_csv_export.details: CSV export includes 'Image URL' column as the last header. Export function properly extracts image_url from products

6_product_box_image_url_field.details: Product editor shows 'Product Image' field with URL input, helper text 'Paste a direct image URL (jpg, png, webp)', and image preview

7_admin_login.details: Admin login works with aditya/lola4304 credentials

8_member_login.details: Member login works with dipali@clubconcierge.in/lola4304 credentials

9_admin_tools_accessible.details: All admin tools accessible - Product Box (682 products), Pricing Hub, Adopt Manager (8 available pets, 4 shelters, 4 events)

10_no_intermediate_welcome_page.details: After login, users are redirected directly to /dashboard without any intermediate 'Welcome back' page

seed_data_creation: Created test user testuser_nopets@test.com for testing no-pet dashboard experience
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 requested features are working. Member dashboard shows Add Pet CTA for users without pets. Admin tools (Product Box, Pricing Hub, Adopt Manager) all have seed buttons and CSV export functionality. No intermediate welcome page exists - users go directly to dashboard after login.
